'''Kaimer''' was the [[Mayor/Legends|mayor]] of [[Wayfar/Legends|Wayfar]] around [[0 BBY/Legends|0 ABY]]. Originally a [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]], he ran for mayor after retiring.

Kaimer was often seen smoking a cigar; this, and his tendency to speak quickly, made understanding him difficult.

==Sources==
